cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve is playing at the end of the match. So, there are five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start in specific positions. The problem says they swap positions in pairs several times, and I need to track those swaps to find out where Eve ends up. First, let me list their starting positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step. 1. **First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions.** - Before this swap, Dave is left winger and Eve is goalkeeper. - After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes left winger. Let me update the positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 2. **Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions.** - Before this swap, Claire is right midfielder and Bob is center midfielder. - After swapping, Claire becomes center midfielder and Bob becomes right midfielder. Updated positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 3. **Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions.** - Before this swap, Alice is fullback and Bob is right midfielder. - After swapping, Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback. Updated positions: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 4. **Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions.** - Before this swap, Eve is left winger and Dave is goalkeeper. - After swapping, Eve becomes goalkeeper and Dave becomes left winger. Updated positions: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper 5. **Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions.** - Before this swap, Bob is fullback and Alice is right midfielder. - After swapping, Bob becomes right midfielder and Alice becomes fullback. Final positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait a minute, according to this, Eve ends up as goalkeeper again. But let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make any mistakes. Let me go through the swaps again, step by step: 1. **First swap: Dave (left winger) and Eve (goalkeeper) trade.** - Dave becomes goalkeeper. - Eve becomes left winger. 2. **Second swap: Claire (right midfielder) and Bob (center midfielder) trade.** - Claire becomes center midfielder. - Bob becomes right midfielder. 3. **Third swap: Alice (fullback) and Bob (right midfielder) trade.** - Alice becomes right midfielder. - Bob becomes fullback. 4. **Fourth swap: Eve (left winger) and Dave (goalkeeper) trade.** - Eve becomes goalkeeper.
